title: CodeGrind: Elevate Your DSA Practice with AI-assisted Challenges
summary: Showcase the new AI-assisted problem-solving guidance and Azure OpenAI integration in CodeGrind, highlighting how users can tackle LeetCode-style challenges with real-time AI help.
core_message: CodeGrind now pairs a real-time code editor with Azure OpenAI-powered assistance, empowering users to reason through problems, learn strategies, and improve solutions faster while keeping momentum in competitive practice.
cta: Try an AI-assisted problem now and share your approach in the comments.
visual_brief: A short screen-capture style video showing the CodeGrind editor: user selects a LeetCode-like problem, types in solution, AI assistant panel provides hints and model answers, then user improves code with guidance. Include UI elements like problem description, code editor, and AI chat pane. End with a quick call-to-action to start a problem and sign in with Google.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind now blends a real-time code editor with Azure OpenAI guidance. See how AI hints help you reason through LeetCode-style challenges, improve solutions, and keep you in flow. Try an AI-assisted problem now and share your approach in the comments. https://codegrind.online
